title: React Bento Grid Metric widget

statement.markdown:
## React Bento Grid Metric KPI Card

Create a Dashboard Metric Card component displaying a values summary and trend visualizer sparkline.

### Requirements:
1. **Visual Trend Sparkline**: Render a lightweight SVG trend sparkline chart based on an input list of historic coordinates.
2. **Trend Percentage Badge**: Display a percentage indicator badge colored green (upwards positive arrow) or red (downwards negative arrow) based on positive or negative value changes.
3. **Responsive layout**: Card grids scaling cleanly onto Bento layout structures.

constraints: Must support mobile responsive layout coordinates

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
